# Ping Identity + Sift Integration

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift partners with Ping Identity to protect revenue from ATO fraud while providing a frictionless experience for your trusted customers. Sift’s integration uses AI-based advanced behavioral and device intelligence gathered along the consumer lifecycle, augmented with Sift’s global data network of signals.

Download the Sift & Ping Identity one-pager and take the first step towards safeguarding your business from account takeover fraud.

### Explore the DaVinci Integration

Download

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
